summary: M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-VALIDATION-001 is closed because PR #231 passed both required CI checks, merged into origin/main, and local main synchronized to 3617115d446a4f234e915abfecf14a367624dc99. The task validates the M7 topology recovery as evidence only: it did not add new test code, and it does not approve formal M7 content lock. M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 is now reopened as a Human Gate for product-owner reconsideration.

tests_run.result: 44 root test files / 366 tests and web 11 tests passed before PR #231.
All listed content fixtures validated before PR #231.
Node/worker deterministic hashes matched before PR #231.
Web build passed before PR #231 with existing chunk warnings.
Storybook build passed before PR #231 with existing plugin/chunk warnings.
Quality/Web/Browser Smoke passed; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed.

decisions.decision: CLOSED only after PR #231 entered origin/main and local main synchronized to 3617115d446a4f234e915abfecf14a367624dc99.
M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 may now be reconsidered by the product owner, but content_lock_accepted remains false.
Record that topology validation did not add new test code; it validated already integrated topology tests and evidence.

risks.summary: Topology evidence PNGs are map-region screenshots under 1440x900 and 1280x720 viewports, not full-viewport PNGs.
Route-node markers and route 24 line validate topology but remain low-fidelity, not final art.
Formal M7 content lock still requires explicit product-owner decision.

requested_action: Product owner must choose APPROVE_CONTENT_LOCK_WITH_LIMITS, DEFER_CONTENT_LOCK, or REQUEST_CHANGES for formal M7 content lock. Do not start M7 exit validation until this Human Gate resolves.
